summary: Verified the RBAC edit-button visibility fix on DesignRequestNewDetail.js. Logged in as Creative Director (non-admin role with design_requests_new view/create/edit=true, delete=false) and confirmed all expected behaviors on DRN-2026-0001 detail page.
critical_code_review_comments: DesignRequestNewDetail.js line 278: `const canDelete = ...;  const [req, setReq] = ...;` are on the same line (double-space separated). Cosmetic only, but readability suffers. Suggest splitting onto separate lines.
test_credentials: creative.director@nylaairwater.earth / test123 (tenant nyla-air-water) — login via password form works, session token returned.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing DRN-2026-0001 (24d674f4-74ac-4752-992e-9fc73c801bc0) authored by CEO Surya Yadavalli.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC gating on DesignRequestNewDetail.js now correctly uses module key 'design_requests_new' for edit/delete checks. Verified for Creative Director (non-admin): Edit + Mark Urgent visible, Delete hidden, /edit route loads. No regressions in login flow.

verification_details.test_case_1_login: PASS — API POST /api/auth/login returned 200 with session_token; frontend redirected to /marketing-requests?queue=all.
verification_details.test_case_2_detail_page_loads: PASS — /design-requests-new/24d674f4-74ac-4752-992e-9fc73c801bc0 loaded; mr-hero present; GET /api/design-requests-new/{id} returned 200.
verification_details.test_case_3_edit_button_visible: PASS — [data-testid=mr-edit-request-btn] present and visible (core fix confirmed).
verification_details.test_case_4_urgent_button_visible: PASS — [data-testid=mr-urgent-toggle-btn] present and visible (shares edit-permission gate).
verification_details.test_case_5_delete_button_hidden: PASS — [data-testid=mr-delete-request-btn] NOT present in DOM (delete=false honored).
verification_details.test_case_6_edit_navigation: PASS — Clicking Edit Request navigates to /design-requests-new/{id}/edit and the edit form (request type, department, due date, requirement details) renders correctly.
